sub_modules.conv1d_window5: Combinational tap-window mapper that exposes the current input sample and four delayed samples as the five causal FIR taps.
sub_modules.conv1d_mult5_fixed: Combinational fixed-coefficient multiplier block implementing hardcoded kernel weights [2, 8, 12, 8, 2].
sub_modules.conv1d_mac5: Combinational five-input adder tree that accumulates the weighted tap products into the MAC sum.
sub_modules.conv1d_gain_shift: Combinational normalization block that right-shifts the MAC sum by GAIN_W to produce the extended-width filtered output.
